tag_management.notes: Client-side GTM container for standard event tracking. Server-side GTM container deployed on acmecorp.com subdomain (sst.acmecorp.com) for conversion signals that benefit from server-side fidelity (Meta CAPI, Google Enhanced Conversions). Server-side container managed by data engineering team. Client-side managed by marketing ops.

pixels_and_tags.name: Meta Pixel
pixels_and_tags.notes: Client-side Pixel fires on all standard events. Server-side CAPI fires on Purchase, Lead, and InitiateCheckout for improved iOS signal. Deduplication handled via event_id parameter passed in both client and server events. Pixel coverage: 98% of sessions.

pixels_and_tags.name: Google Ads Conversion Tag
pixels_and_tags.notes: Google Ads tag fires via GTM. Enhanced Conversions enabled — hashes first-party data (email, phone, address) for improved match rate. Transaction ID passed for deduplication with GA4 imports. Conversion import from GA4 also configured as secondary signal.

pixels_and_tags.name: Google Analytics 4
pixels_and_tags.notes: GA4 primary analytics platform. Linked to Google Ads for conversion import and audience building. BigQuery export enabled — daily export to acme-analytics-prod dataset. User ID passed for cross-device attribution. Enhanced Measurement enabled for scroll, outbound clicks, video engagement.

pixels_and_tags.name: LinkedIn Insight Tag
pixels_and_tags.notes: Insight Tag sitewide. Lead and Purchase conversion events for B2B campaigns. Also enables LinkedIn Audience Network retargeting and demographic data overlay in GA4.

pixels_and_tags.name: TikTok Pixel
pixels_and_tags.notes: Client-side only. TikTok Events API (server-side) planned for Q3 2026.

pixels_and_tags.name: CM360 Floodlight Tags
pixels_and_tags.notes: Floodlight tags managed in CM360. Global site tag deployed via GTM. U-variable capture configured — see CM360 setup section.

conversion_apis.deduplication_method: event_id — same event_id sent via Pixel and CAPI; Meta deduplicates on their end
conversion_apis.notes: Implemented via server-side GTM container using Stape.io CAPI gateway. Payload includes: event_id, event_time, user_data (hashed email + phone + IP + user_agent), custom_data (value, currency, order_id). Match rate improved from 68% to 87% after adding phone hash. Review match rate monthly in Events Manager.

conversion_apis.deduplication_method: Google deduplicates automatically via gclid + enhanced conversion data match
conversion_apis.notes: Enhanced Conversions sends hashed first-party data (email, phone, name, address) alongside conversion tag. Implemented via GTM Enhanced Conversions template. Data is hashed client-side before sending. Match rate reported in Google Ads > Conversions > Diagnostics.

u_variables.name: order_id
u_variables.description: Unique order/transaction ID. Used for deduplication and revenue reconciliation.

u_variables.name: order_value
u_variables.description: Order revenue value in USD at time of purchase.

u_variables.name: product_category
u_variables.description: Top-level product category of items purchased.

u_variables.name: customer_type
u_variables.description: New vs returning customer at time of conversion.

u_variables.name: items_count
u_variables.description: Number of line items in the order.

u_variables.name: promo_code
u_variables.description: Promotional code applied to the order, if any.

cm360.notes: Floodlight tags deployed via GTM. U-variables populated from the dataLayer on purchase confirmation page. All CM360 reports use order_id (u1) as the primary deduplication key.

website_data_capture.notes: First-party cookies set on .acmecorp.com domain via server-side GTM to avoid ITP/browser restrictions. GCLID and FBC values captured and stored in first-party cookie to extend attribution window beyond 7 days. Cookie consent managed via OneTrust — analytics and marketing cookies require opt-in in EU. US: opt-out model.

measurement_partners.name: Northstar MMM (Marketing Mix Modeling)
measurement_partners.notes: Quarterly MMM run covers all paid channels plus organic, email, and offline. Output: contribution by channel, diminishing returns curves, optimal budget allocation. Last run: Q1 2026. Results used for Q2 budget reallocation. Data feed: weekly spend and impressions per channel sent to Northstar via automated Looker Studio export.

measurement_partners.name: Meta Conversion Lift Studies
measurement_partners.notes: Holdout-based incrementality tests run quarterly through Meta. Control group (2-5% holdout) receives no ads. Measures true incremental conversions driven by Meta spend. Last study Q4 2025 showed 34% of Meta-attributed conversions were incremental. Results used to apply an incrementality adjustment factor to Meta ROAS reporting.

measurement_partners.name: Google Reach Planner & Brand Lift
measurement_partners.notes: Brand lift surveys run on YouTube and DV360 campaigns spending >$75k/quarter. Measures ad recall, brand awareness, consideration lift. Managed through Google Ads UI. Results feed into brand team quarterly reporting.

measurement_partners.name: Neustar Identity Resolution
measurement_partners.notes: Under evaluation for cross-device identity resolution and offline-to-online attribution. POC scheduled Q3 2026.
